en_title: The View From Japan: PlayStation's Push for an All-Digital Future Raises Concerns From Gamers and Developers — Including a Well-Timed Retweet From Hideo Kojima
cn_title: PlayStation全数字未来引日本担忧，小岛秀夫转发旧帖
subtitle: 实体盘告别倒计时
opus_summary: 索尼宣布2028年1月起新PlayStation游戏不再发行光盘后，日本玩家和开发者也表达担忧。小岛秀夫适时转发旧帖，重申数字内容可能随时失去访问权。

paragraphs.en: On July 1, Sony announced that no new PlayStation games will ship on-disc from January 2028 onwards . This move to a digital-only future has sparked widespread backlash and concerns about game preservation and ownership, including in Sony’s homeland of Japan, where developers and fans have also expressed disapproval of the move.
paragraphs.cn: 7月1日，索尼宣布从2028年1月起，新的PlayStation游戏将不再以光盘形式出货。这一迈向数字-only未来的举措引发了广泛反弹，也让人担心游戏保存和所有权问题。在索尼的故乡日本，开发者和粉丝也对这一决定表达了不满。

paragraphs.en: Hideo Kojima, although not addressing the situation directly, topically reposted his previous comments on the pitfalls of a digital-only future. In two tweets dating from August 2021, Kojima said that, “Eventually, even digital data will no longer be owned by individuals on their own initiative. Whenever there is a major change or accident in the world, in a country, in a government, in an idea, in a trend, access to it may suddenly be cut off. We will not be able to freely access the movies, books, and music that we have loved. I would be a have-not. That's what I'm afraid of. This is not greed.”
paragraphs.cn: 小岛秀夫虽然没有直接回应这件事，但适时转发了自己此前关于全数字未来陷阱的评论。在2021年8月的两条推文中，小岛表示：「最终，即便是数字数据，也将不再由个人按自己的意愿拥有。每当世界、国家、政府、思想或潮流发生重大变化或事故时，访问权都可能突然被切断。我们将无法自由访问自己喜爱的电影、书籍和音乐。我会变成一个无所有者。这就是我害怕的事。这不是贪婪。」

paragraphs.en: Shueisha Games’ Masami Yamamoto, who has been involved in game production for decades within the Sony group, discussed how PlayStation moving to a digital-only future might affect game publishing timelines. “We’ll have about one-and-a-half months more to really polish the master if we don’t have to make a disc version,” Yamamoto said, before explaining that “even nowadays when day one patches are the norm, if there is a disc version you still need to get the game into a finalized state in which there are no serious flaws that would hinder gameplay.” He added that on an ideal schedule, the master should be completed two months prior to the game’s release.
paragraphs.cn: 集英社游戏的Masami Yamamoto曾在索尼集团内部参与游戏制作数十年。他谈到PlayStation走向全数字未来可能如何影响游戏发行时间表。Yamamoto说：「如果不需要制作光盘版，我们大概能多出一个半月来真正打磨母盘。」他随后解释道：「即便现在首日补丁已经是常态，只要有光盘版，你仍然需要把游戏做到一个最终状态，不能有会妨碍游玩的严重缺陷。」他补充说，在理想时间表下，母盘应该在游戏发售前两个月完成。

paragraphs.en: There is a lot of concern that going digital-only will deal a big blow to Japan’s second-hand game stores and market. Voice actor and gamer Masaru Yoshimura was among those who expressed shock at Sony’s announcement, commenting that , “My hobby is browsing PlayStation titles at game stores and I prefer physical game cases so this makes me way too sad.” Others opined that one of the ways that PlayStation currently has an edge over PC is the option to buy your favorite games on disc. “Some people choose to get the PlayStation version instead of the PC version because it's on disc or it's a limited edition physical version," one person said .
paragraphs.cn: 许多人担心，全面数字化会对日本二手游戏店和二手游戏市场造成重大打击。声优兼玩家Masaru Yoshimura就是对索尼公告表达震惊的人之一。他评论说：「我的爱好是在游戏店里浏览PlayStation作品，而且我更喜欢实体游戏盒，所以这让我太难过了。」另一些人认为，PlayStation目前相对PC的优势之一，就是可以购买自己喜欢游戏的光盘版。有人说：「有些人选择买PlayStation版而不是PC版，就是因为它有光盘，或者有限定实体版。」

paragraphs.en: Others questioned Sony’s timing of this announcement, noting that it came on the same day as the announcement about shutting down the PS3 and PS Vita online stores. “Announcing them both at the same time was bound to make customers anxious and think, ‘Does this mean that corporate decisions could make digitally bought games I bought unplayable at any moment!?” Indeed, the announcement also comes hot on the heels of Sony’s upcoming deletion of over 550 movies purchased by PlayStation users — with no refund — prompting further distrust of a digital-only future. “Digital is convenient but it only grants the right to play the game. Owning things seems like it's becoming a value from the past, doesn’t it?” said one X user on the topic .
paragraphs.cn: 还有人质疑索尼宣布这件事的时机，指出它与关闭PS3和PS Vita在线商店的公告发生在同一天。「同时宣布这两件事，肯定会让顾客不安，并想到：『这是不是意味着，公司决策随时都可能让我买过的数字游戏变得无法游玩！？』」事实上，这一公告也紧随索尼即将删除PlayStation用户购买的550多部电影之后，而且没有退款，这进一步加深了人们对全数字未来的不信任。一名X用户谈到这个话题时说：「数字版很方便，但它只授予游玩游戏的权利。拥有东西这件事，似乎正在变成过去的价值观，不是吗？」

paragraphs.en: On the flip side, some commenters pointed out that the writing has been on the wall for physical console games for a long time. Digital sales have been on an upward trend with Sony reporting that 78% of game sales in 2025 were downloads (although, this also includes games that do not have a physical release). In its PlayStation Blog post , Sony described phasing out discs as the company adapting “to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs.”
paragraphs.cn: 另一方面，一些评论者指出，实体主机游戏的结局其实早有预兆。数字销量一直呈上升趋势，索尼报告称，2025年游戏销量中有78%是下载版（尽管这也包括没有实体版的游戏）。索尼在PlayStation Blog文章中称，逐步淘汰光盘是公司在适应「消费者趋势，因为人们对数字媒介的总体偏好显著超过实体光盘」。

paragraphs.en: If games continue to get physical releases, it seems that they will be ‘code in a box’ affairs, like Grand Theft Auto 6’s disc-less physical version , which caused a stir last month. All of this points towards a digital-only future for consoles, with both PS6 and Xbox’s upcoming console, Project Helix, reportedly launching without a disc drive.
paragraphs.cn: 如果游戏继续发行实体版，看起来它们会变成「盒内兑换码」形式，就像上个月引发轰动的《GTA6》无盘实体版一样。所有这些都指向主机的全数字未来，据报道，PS6和XBOX即将推出的主机Project Helix都将不带光驱发布。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere, the official UK Domino’s Pizza account has been grilling Sony for the decision like its personal, issuing a mock statement that it will switch to digital pizzas only in response to gaming industry trends. KFC also dunked on Sony in a similar manner .
paragraphs.cn: 在其他地方，英国Domino’s Pizza官方账号也像这件事和自己有关一样拷问索尼，发布了一份恶搞声明，称为了回应游戏行业趋势，它将改为只提供数字披萨。KFC也用类似方式嘲讽了索尼。

paragraphs.en: A recent IGN poll found that 90% of readers do not support an all-digital gaming future , but recent statements from Sony suggest it is unlikely to backtrack on its decision, and it’s already moving to reassign disc production workers to other areas of the business .
paragraphs.cn: IGN最近的一项投票发现，90%的读者不支持全数字游戏未来。但索尼最近的声明表明，它不太可能收回决定，而且已经开始把光盘生产员工重新安排到公司其他业务领域。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是一名常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、撰稿人和译者。她也为多家出版物撰写过有关日本文化和电影的文章。
